title: Creating an App - Workspace Template not showing up
excerpt:
Hi - I am trying to create an app so that I can use it to share with other users as a template. However, when I go to choose a workspace, nothing is showing up in the dropdown. 
Can anyone please help <3

posts.author: DamianCuschieri (Damian Cuschieri)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi - I am trying to create an app so that I can use it to share with other users as a template. However, when I go to choose a workspace, nothing is showing up in the dropdown.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @DamianCuschieri and welcome to the community!

Would you be able to please fill this form so our team can take a look into this? Please add as much detail about your case as possible.

Looking forward to hearing from you via the form!

Cheers,
